text:
Hello Stanislav,
Strange, but now it works. Maybe csup helped.
I think the ticket can be closed now.
Thanks.

Igor.

>
> Thanks for contacting us!
>

> object dir.
> Having a full build log will be helpful too.
>
> Best regards,
